title: 100Pcs CD DVD Sleeves, Standard Plastic Double-Sided Clear CD Sleeve case with Drop-Proof Closure, for CD and DVD Storage Binders Disc Storage
features: Double-sided design: Each DVD storage sleeve can hold 2 CDs, which increases the storage space and helps you to organise your CDs or DVDs neatly and easily. They can be placed in a box or on a shelf, with both sides providing a clear view of the stored CDs.
Reliable material: The DVD sleeves are made of high quality PP and non-woven fabric, reliable and reusable, soft and durable, waterproof and fall-proof, so you can rely on their use

Reasonable size: each plastic DVD case is about 5.1 inches * 5.5 inches, with pockets on both sides to hold discs, easy to carry when you are on the go and carry your CDs or DVDs with you, they provide a convenient and lightweight way to carry them around

Ideal Gifts: The double-sided DVD case is an ideal gift for friends, family, flatmates and CD audiophiles, with this gift they can better store their CDs, enjoy them and save them for a longer period of time.

Package contents: you will receive 100 double-sided plastic DVD cases, which can hold a total of 200 DVDs, enough to meet your needs and replacement, categorise your CDs and save time and effort for your next search.
description: Product Description Say goodbye to disc cases and save disc storage space Features: 1. 100pcs/a set, you can storage many disc. 2. Made of 2 layers of 0.1MMCPP+50G non-woven fabric. 3. Protects CDs from dust, moisture, scratches and data damage. 4. Saves storage space, can be numbered, holds CDs and liner notes in both sides easily. 5. It can protect your CD, DVD disc very well. Specifications: Color: White Material: PP film, fiber cloth Size: 5.1 inch * 5.5 inch Suitable for: DVD Discs What's in it for you? Save Storage Space Reserve more storage space so you can put more discs in the same storage space Marked Decorative Cover You can resize the cover of a CD disc to fit into a sleeve or use the empty space for numbering and sorting. Double-sided Storage Double sided storage with large storage space, perfect for storing CDs while protecting them from damage Notes: 1. Please allow 0-1 cm error due to manual measurement. Thanks for your understanding. 2. Monitors are not calibrated same, item color displayed in photos may be showing slightly different from real object.
